purpose: One deterministic tick for a managed goal: read destination/evidence/capabilities/route from <statePath>/goals/instances/<id>/state.json, dispatch the capability for the first missing evidence, or mark the goal done. No agent.

goal.description: Goal id — directory name under <statePath>/goals/instances/ in the configured state repo.

success: goal-manager completes and returns a valid canonical result
failure: goal-manager cannot return a valid canonical result
